config.script:
'count_salda #include "50107"
'getCurrentRKS #include "50120"
'srvDate #include "50126"
sub plug_konto_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval idKonta)
dim pKonto : set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonta)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKonto.strNazwa
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Podmiot").element.bold = true if not pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach is nothing then pTB.newcell.addtexthli pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach.idobj)+"'") else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if
end sub
sub plug_konto_opis(byref pContainer,byval idKonto)
dim pKonto : set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonto)
if pKonto.strOpis="" then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext pKonto.strOpis
end sub
#define FULL_COLSPAN 5 #define SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA 16
sub plug_konto_obroty(byref pContainer,byval idKonto) dim pKonto : set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonto)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,ID_TABLE_OBROTY) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
dim pRKS : set pRKS = getCurrentRKS() if pRKS is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext "Nie określono bieżącego roku księgowego" with pTB.element .bold = true .forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end with
with pTB.cell .colspan=clng(FULL_COLSPAN) .keepline=true end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER exit sub end if
'--- nagłówek pTB.section_head pTB.newrow.newcell with pTB.row .styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER .border = 0 end with pTB.newcell.addtext("Obroty Wn").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Obroty Ma").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT dim strTitle if pKonto.eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE then strTitle = "Saldo Wn" else strTitle = "Saldo Sald Wn" end if pTB.newcell.addtext(strTitle).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT if pKonto.eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE then strTitle = "Saldo Ma" else strTitle = "Saldo Sald Ma" end if pTB.newcell.addtext(strTitle).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.section_body
dim strWaluta: strWaluta = pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot dim dStartDate : dStartDate = dateserial(year(pRKS.dDataRozp),month(pRKS.dDataRozp),1) dim dEndDate : dEndDate = dateserial(year(pRKS.dDataZakon),month(pRKS.dDataZakon) + 1,0)
dim curSaldoWn,curSaldoMa dim curObrWn : curObrWn = ccur(0.0) dim curObrMa : curObrMa = ccur(0.0) dim curBOWn, curBOMa
'-------- BO pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN dim oRSBO : set oRSBO = trans_.createadors("select isnull(sum(curWN),0) as wn,isnull(sum(curMA),0) as ma from n5dekret_sums where pKonto=" + cstr(pKonto.idobj) +_ " and ddataksieg between "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dStartDate) +" and "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dEndDate) +_ " and eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_BO")
curBOWn = ccur(oRSBO("wn")) curBOMa = ccur(oRSBO("ma"))
curSaldoWn = curBOWn curSaldoMa = curBOMa count_salda curSaldoWn,curSaldoMa
pTB.row.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext "BO" with pTB.newcell.addtext("").cell pTB.element.size = SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.element.align = ALIGN_RIGHT .align = ALIGN_RIGHT end with with pTB.newcell.addtext("").cell pTB.element.size = SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.element.align = ALIGN_RIGHT .align = ALIGN_RIGHT end with with pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoWn, strWaluta)).cell pTB.element.size = SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.element.align = ALIGN_RIGHT .align = ALIGN_RIGHT end with with pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoMa, strWaluta)).cell pTB.element.size = SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.element.align = ALIGN_RIGHT .align = ALIGN_RIGHT end with
'-------- stworzenie przestrzeni dla wyników
dim dCurrMonth : dCurrMonth = dStartDate dim bEven : bEven = false
dim nFirstMonthRow : nFirstMonthRow = pTB.rownr() do while dCurrMonth <= dEndDate pTB.newrow dim pHli: set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_ZAPISY_NA_KONTACH " + _ " appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAPISY_NA_KONCIE appvar_zapisy_report_analit='"+cstr(pKonto.eAnalit)+"' appvar_zapisy_report_konto='"+ CStr(pKonto.strSymbol) + _ "' appvar_zapisy_report_rok=" + cstr(year(dCurrMonth)) + " appvar_zapisy_report_mies=" + cstr(month(dCurrMonth)))
pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(year(dCurrMonth))+" "+ MonthName(month(dCurrMonth)) , pHLI dim iter for iter = 1 to 4 with pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(0) , strWaluta)).cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT if iter mod 2 <> 0 then .styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if end with next dCurrMonth = dateserial(year(dCurrMonth),month(dCurrMonth)+1,1)
bEven = not bEven loop
'--- 'uwaga: algorytm nie obsluguje lat ksiegowych niezgodnych z kalendarzowymi '---
dim curWn,curMa dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors("select nNumer as miesiac," +_ "isnull((select sum(curWN) from n5dekret_sums where pKonto=" + cstr(pKonto.idobj) +" and ddataksieg " +_ "between "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dStartDate) +" AND "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dEndDate) + " and eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY and month(ddataksieg)=n5miesiac.nNumer),0) as wn," +_ "isnull((select sum(curMA) from n5dekret_sums where pKonto=" + cstr(pKonto.idobj) +" and ddataksieg " +_ "between "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dStartDate) +" AND "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dEndDate) + " and eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY and month(ddataksieg)=n5miesiac.nNumer),0) as ma" +_ " from n5miesiac order by nNumer")
do while not oRS.EOF dim nRok : nRok = clng(year(dStartDate)) dim nMc : nMc = clng(oRS("miesiac")) curWn = CCur(oRS("wn")) curMa = CCur(oRS("ma"))
curObrWn = curObrWn + curWn curObrMa = curObrMa + curMa curSaldoWn = curObrWn + curBOWn curSaldoMa = curObrMa + curBOMa count_salda curSaldoWn,curSaldoMa
dim nRow : nRow = countMonths(dStartDate,dateserial(nRok,nMc,1)) + nFirstMonthRow dim pRow : set pRow = pPlugInTable.body.row(nRow)
pRow.cell(2).element(1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curWn , strWaluta) pRow.cell(3).element(1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curMa , strWaluta) pRow.cell(4).element(1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoWn , strWaluta) pRow.cell(5).element(1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoMa , strWaluta) oRS.MoveNext loop
'-------- BZ pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN dim oRSBZ : set oRSBZ = trans_.createadors("select isnull(sum(curWN),0) as wn,isnull(sum(curMA),0) as ma from n5dekret where pKonto=" + cstr(pKonto.idobj) +_ " and ddataksieg between "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dStartDate) +" and "+ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(dEndDate) +_ "and eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_BZ_OSTAT")
curWn = CCur(oRSBZ("wn")) curMa = CCur(oRSBZ("ma"))
curObrWn = curObrWn + curWn curObrMa = curObrMa + curMa curSaldoWn = curObrWn + curBOWn curSaldoMa = curObrMa + curBOMa count_salda curSaldoWn,curSaldoMa
pTB.row.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext "Bilans zamknięcia" pTB.newcell.addtext("").cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("").cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoWn, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoMa, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
'-------- Razem pTB.newrow curSaldoWn = curObrWn + curBOWn curSaldoMa = curObrMa + curBOMa count_salda curSaldoWn,curSaldoMa
with pTB.row .bold = true .styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER .border =0 end with
pTB.newcell.addtext "Narastająco" pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curObrWn, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curObrMa, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoWn, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoMa, strWaluta)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
end sub
private function countMonths(dDataRozp,dDataZakon) countMonths = 12*(year(dDataZakon) - year(dDataRozp)) + ((month(dDataZakon) - month(dDataRozp)) + 1) end function
sub plug_konto_budzety(byref pContainer,byval idKonto)
dim pKonto : set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonto)
dim crs:set crs = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5KONTO_BUDZET,"pKonto=" + cstr(idKonto),"n5budzet.strNazwa","n5budzet on n5budzet.idobj = n5konto_budzet.pBudzet") dim elem
if not crs.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 1
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.cell.width = MINIMIZE_SIZE
pTB.newcell.addtext("Plan").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER
pTB.newcell.addtext("Realizacja").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Realizacja %").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.cell.colspan = 2
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("") pTB.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Faktyczne").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Prognoza").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Faktyczne").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Prognoza").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT dim curMa, curWn
for each elem in crs pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.pBudzet.strNazwa , _ doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5KONTO_BUDZET,%1,USAGE_VIEW)") _ (elem.idobj).Done())
pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curKwota,elem.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curRealizacja, elem.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
'wykonanie przewidywane pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curPrognoza, elem.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
dim strValue 'wykonanie aktualne procentowo if elem.curKwota = 0 then strValue = "plan równy 0" else strValue = doc_.afc.display.quantity(100 * elem.curRealizacja / elem.curKwota,"%",2) end if pTB.newcell.addtext strValue pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
'wykonanie przewidywane procentowe if elem.curKwota = 0 then strValue = "plan równy 0" else strValue = doc_.afc.display.quantity(100 * elem.curPrognoza / elem.curKwota,"%",2) end if
pTB.newcell.addtext strValue pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
next
pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan = 6 with pTB.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1) .text = "Aktualizuj" .tip = "Przycisk aktualizuje budżety od razu dla wszystkich kont" set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='refresh_budzet_section'") .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with end sub
